# Windcutter
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Windcutter&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo|name = Windcutter|desc = A suspiciously looking katana|rarity = l|slot = katana|tier = UT|minDmg = 240|maxDmg = 280|shots = 1|rof = 120|range2 = 5.6|fameb = 6|effects = yes|pierce = yes|multihit = yes|passthrough = yes|bonuses = {{Stat|spd|3}}{{Stat|dex|3}}|legendary = 4|dropsFrom = suspicious looking dragon}}
